meaning: n.文明,文化,文明社会 文明,一个著名游戏的名称
examples: I finally reached what we laughingly call civilization.
Environmental damage threatens the whole of civilization.
It's good to be back in civilization after two weeks in a tent!
Western civilization s signature achievement was not democracy but the idea that laws prevail over lawgivers.
Here, clustered together in the middle of nowhere, were relics of Irish civilization that spanned thousands of years.
